HomePage.title: Digital concierge
HomePage.subtitle: Rules, social areas, management, and service requests in one app.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Residential complex, digital concierge, and resident services.
AboutPage.title: About the complex
AboutPage.lead: Olive Garden — one app for residents: information, service requests, and a site document assistant.
AboutPage.p1: The complex is supported by a digital concierge for orderly use of shared spaces and safety. Full features unlock after management approves your registration.
AboutPage.p2: Use the app for up-to-date information on social areas and rules, and to submit technical and administrative requests.
AboutPage.p3: The AI assistant relies only on approved documents uploaded to the system; do not share unnecessary personal data.

ContactsPage.title: Contact
ContactsPage.lead: Use the channels below for questions. For emergencies, use local emergency numbers.
ContactsPage.addressValue:
Olive Garden Complex

Antalya, Turkey

Auth.magicLinkHint: We will send a one-time sign-in link to your email.
Auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox and open the link.
Auth.confirmEmail: Account created. Confirm your email via the message, then sign in.

Pending.title: Awaiting approval
Pending.body: All features will unlock once management verifies your registration.
Pending.rejectedBody: Management declined this registration. See the note below. Contact the board if needed.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: Your details and board review status.

Chat.title: AI assistant
Chat.disclaimer: Answers are based on uploaded documents only; not legal advice.

Board.noAccess: You do not have access to this section.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.intro: Manage roles and open board tools. The first admin account is created once via the server script in README; after that you can grant admin here.
Admin.cardUsersDesc: Grant or revoke board and admin roles.
Admin.name: Name
Admin.lastAdmin: You cannot remove the last admin.
Admin.userNotFound: No user with this email (they must sign up first).
Admin.requiredBody: Your account does not have the admin role. If you should have access, ask an existing admin to grant it in Admin → Users, or use the one-time server script from the project README.
